case_title: TERI WEISSINGER VS. US AIRWAYS, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY WEISSINGER, TERI AS TO DEFENDANT US AIRWAYS, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-19-2014 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

REQUEST TO WAIVE COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY PLAINTIFF WEISSINGER, TERI ORDER FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS GRANTED PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - SIGNED SERVED APR-09-2014, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT US AIRWAYS, INC.
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT US AIRWAYS, INC.
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL GRANTED
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-19-2014 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUN-23-2014 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT US AIRWAYS, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUN-23-2014 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUN-23-2014 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY DONNA HOLTON--CLAIMS ADMIN. NO COST, IFP FILED BY PLAINTIFF. PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-23-2014 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEISSINGER, TERI IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT US AIRWAYS, INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
